PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Continued To May-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ryutaro Hirota for Shoko Kinukawa via Court Call

Mr. Hirota stated that he met with the beneficiaries, they have agreed to receive the property, and he will be moving forward and filing a petition for final distribution as soon as possible. The Court noted the filed Notice of Hearing is incorrect as it has no statutory language in it. Mr. Hirota stated that he will re-file it immediately. The Report of Status of Administration is continued to May 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a properly notice petition for approval of report on status of administration or a petition for final distribution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2018 Continued To Apr-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Continued To Feb-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryutaro Hirota for Administrator.
Midori Hirai (Mr. Hirota's Assistant) also present.

Mr. Hirota stated that they received information from a Realtor in Siskiyou County that the Buyer went somewhere else, that it is difficult to get a hold of the Beneficiaries and that there is an issue as to valuation of the properties. Ms. Hirai stated that the Probate Referees in Siskiyou County and Modoc County took a long time to get back to the San Francisco Referee, and that they were told by San Francisco that they were outdated valuations. Status on close of estate is continued to February 28, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that it expects a final inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for approval of report on status of administration, or a petition for final distribution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
